name: Sauteed Fennel, Radicchio, and Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 fennel bulb trimmed and cut lengthwise into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch non-stick skillet, heat oil over moderately high heat until hot but not smoking.
2. Add pine nuts to the skillet and stir until golden brown in color.
3. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the pine nuts to paper towels to drain excess oil.
4. In the same skillet, add garlic cloves and cook, stirring, until they turn golden brown.
5. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and discard it.
6. Add fennel slices to the skillet and stir until they are golden brown in color.
7. About 2 minutes later, add lemon juice, salt, and pepper to taste. Stir well and cook until the fennel is crisp-tender.
8. Mix in the radicchio pieces and continue cooking over moderately high heat, tossing with two wooden spoons, just until the radicchio becomes wilted and tender.
9. Return the pine nuts to the skillet and stir to season with additional salt and pepper.
Yield: 2 servings
